arithmetic-product-content.last_note: Complete proof verified: weighted-product descent terminates every schedule and prime-column gcd invariance forces the unique terminal nonunit.
arithmetic-product-content.summary: Direct weighted-product descent plus invariant prime-exponent gcds gives the explicit terminal integer.

valuation-vector-normal-form.last_note: Complete proof verified: exponent-vector Phi descent terminates every schedule and coordinate subgroup invariance forces the unique normal form.
valuation-vector-normal-form.summary: Exponent-vector L1 normalization plus invariant coordinate subgroups forces a unique normal form.
